# PERF-98 positive: redis Set called in a for loop without Pipeline
lang: go
file: PERF-098-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"context"
	"github.com/redis/go-redis/v9"
)

func SetAll(ctx context.Context, rdb *redis.Client, keys []string) error {
	for _, k := range keys {
		if err := rdb.Set(ctx, k, "1", 0).Err(); err != nil {
			return err
		}
	}
	return nil
}
